intro: HP has announced a new Windows AI PC powered by Nvidia's GB300 processor, featuring 784GB of unified memory capable of handling trillion-parameter models with server-grade performance. Sriram Krishnan is departing his role as Trump's AI policy adviser as the administration explores acquiring government stakes in AI companies. OpenAI introduced Lockdown Mode to reduce prompt injection attacks and protect sensitive data in ChatGPT, though vulnerabilities remain.
